predictions.claim: prod-like env preparation writes WEB_UPSTREAM=127.0.0.1:3000 and MANAGER_UPSTREAM=127.0.0.1:8080 even when stale values exist.
predictions.falsifier: Focused unit test observes stale Caddy upstream values surviving production env preparation.

predictions.claim: After rerunning the production stack, Caddy agent/API route checks pass locally and public checks pass when tunnel/DNS forwarding is valid.
predictions.falsifier: deploy smoke still reports caddy_agent_route or caddy_api_route as HTTP 502 with healthy web/manager services.

rejected_candidates.reason: Would make this host pass but leave stale production env values able to break the next fresh deploy.
Defaults are already correct; explicit stale env keys override them.
Incorrect topology; /app belongs inside built containers.

stop_conditions: Caddy 502 remains after forced host-loopback upstream env
unit test cannot assert without exposing env secrets
patch requires touching unrelated UI Lab work
